Precinct Detail

▼
Precinct Sup District Registered Est. Ballots Turnout %
Base voters are reliable Scott Wiener supporters — liberal-to-moderate Democrats, often LGBTQ+ allied, concentrated in Districts 2, 3, 6, 7, and 8.

Persuasion voters are reachable but not yet committed — moderate Democrats and NPP voters who could go either way based on campaign contact.

Opposition includes MAGA-aligned voters, likely Saikat Chakrabarti supporters, and strong conservatives who are unlikely to support Scott.

Base Drop-off are base supporters with low turnout probability — the highest-ROI mobilization targets.
